title: Coco 'n' the Fellas + Cafe Manouche: Gypsy Swing Double Bill
titleEn: Coco 'n' the Fellas + Cafe Manouche: Gypsy Swing Double Bill
titleBg: Coco 'n' the Fellas и Cafe Manouche: Джипси суинг вечер
description: Two leading vintage quartets join forces for a special double gypsy swing event in the heart of Soho.
descriptionEn: Two leading vintage quartets join forces for a special double gypsy swing event in the heart of Soho.
descriptionBg: Два водещи винтидж квартета обединяват сили за специално джипси суинг събитие в сърцето на Сохо.
body:
Come and join us for a special evening with two Leading Vintage Quartets. A Double Gypsy Swing Event in the centre of Soho.

A lot of Swing, a lot of tapping and a whole lot of joy and smiles to be brought by the bands. We hope to see you there! 
Doors open: 6PM

Make sure you buy your tickets in advance! 

Tickets: £8 in adv (£10 on the door) 
http://www.wegottickets.com/event/394341


Cafe Manouche Quartet:
Since forming in 2014 the band have played countless venues and festivals across London and throughout the UK, including producing and touring their own show. 
Playing music from the 1920s to the 50s, including Parisian Waltzes, hot swing and touches of Be-bop, latin and bossa nova, played in the distinctive style of Gypsy jazz guitar legend Django Reinhardt and the hot club of France. 
The band recorded an EP in 2015 and are due to record their debut album this year, while also working towards writing some original material. 

Natalia Amy Douglas - vocals
Matt Kerry - acoustic guitar
Harry Diplock - acoustic guitar
Mark Lewandoski - double bass 

Coco 'n' the Fellas:

The band has recorded two albums in the last year and is soon preparing to go into the studio to record original material for the first time. They have also performed and toured Italy, Bulgaria, Norway and Scotland
All four members are committed composers and throughout the past year they have been working on pushing the boundaries of the Gypsy Swing style. Breathtaking arrangements, varied repertoire and highly regarded musicianship ensure that Coco will transport you to a sonic landscape of Gypsy jazz, bebop, fusion and more. 

Ami Oprenova - vocals
Daniele Ciuffreda - electric guitar
Joe Perkins - acoustic guitar
Havard Tanner - double bass
bodyEn:
Join us for a special evening with two leading vintage quartets. A Double Gypsy Swing Event in the heart of Soho!

A lot of swing, a lot of foot-tapping, and a whole lot of joy brought by the bands. We hope to see you there!

Cafe Manouche Quartet:
Since forming in 2014, the band has played countless venues and festivals across London and the UK. Playing music from the 1920s to the 50s, including Parisian Waltzes, hot swing, and touches of bebop, latin, and bossa nova.

Coco 'n' the Fellas:
With breathtaking arrangements and varied repertoire, Coco will transport you to a sonic landscape of gypsy jazz, bebop, fusion and more. The band has performed across Italy, Bulgaria, Norway, and Scotland.
bodyBg:
Присъединете се към нас за специална вечер с два водещи винтидж квартета. Двойно джипси суинг събитие в сърцето на Сохо!

Много суинг и много усмивки от двете групи. Надяваме се да ви видим там!

Cafe Manouche Quartet:
От формирането си през 2014 г., групата е свирила в безброй клубове и фестивали в Лондон и Обединеното кралство. Изпълняват музика от 20-те до 50-те години, включително парижки валсове, хот суинг и елементи на бибоп и боса нова.

Coco 'n' the Fellas:
Със спиращи дъха аранжименти и разнообразен репертоар, Coco ще ви пренесе в звуков пейзаж от джипси джаз, бибоп, фюжън и още. Групата е изнасяла концерти в Италия, България, Норвегия и Шотландия.
